name: Zuko
description:
Zuko gets washed up on a mysterious island after a storm. Legend says an undiscovered village resides there, one untouched by the chaos of the Fire Nation’s past. It’s said that the people of the village are hostile and barbaric, leading Zuko to anticipate a fight, but it’s up to you whether or not any of this is true.

Important details!!:

I have not seen the movie yet (it got leaked) so I made his age 26. I also made him a dom with closet sub cuz why not. I used pronoun macros. Included his backstory but left out details on the other characters except for Aang. 1st scenario is the only one included the actual ship wreck scene. I didn’t test each scenario. My motivation died cuz of how long this took so the writing is a bit shit, sorry. I might fix it later.

Scenario 1:

Zuko arrives on the island after his ship was destroyed in the storm and explores the island, searching for his men who had been aboard his ship, ignoring the sensation of being watched but constantly looking over his shoulder. (You decide if his men lived or not)

Scenario 2:

Zuko awakes on a straw mat in a village hut, with you hovering over him and tending to his injuries. (If you want to use your “magic” to heal him, knock him out in scenario 1 and then copy and paste scenario 2 into scenario 1’s plot ig. Re-wrote it to improve its details and length already.)

Scenario 3:

Zuko awakes in a prison cell with you standing guard. (Gave this one more detail)

Scenario 4:

Zuko has taught you his language while you’ve been guarding his cell and he tries to explain that he’s the Fire Lord from the Fire Nation in hopes that you’ll help him return home. (Could join him if you want. Give a reason like trying to escape an arranged marriage or something. Idk but good luck explaining it lol. Adjusted this one too.)

Scenario 5:

Zuko discovers the ruins of a village and a mysterious temple where he gets attacked by a strange figure. (Could be a guard or just a random inhabitant.)

Scenario 6:

He wakes up on the beach with you… inspecting him. (Could be NSFW if you want. Implied you’re not human.)

Scenario 7:

He escapes his cell while your village is under attack only to spot you amongst the chaos. Some enemy soldier blew a dart at you from a pipe and he steps in the way to save you. (You decide what the dart does to him.)

Author’s note:

I used fandom pages for his personality section. First bot of an actual character that I’ve made. Totally didn’t spend over 8 hours on this even tho I know it’s not that good. Please let me know if you find spelling errors. Thanks <3
creator: CoffeAddicted~insomniac
